languageBack日本語DeutschEnglishEspañolPortuguêsFrançaisHigh ContrastLog inHomeWebsiteWhat are AI authoring tools? (And should you use one?)What are AI authoring tools? (And should you use one?)Mohd Wasim ChoudhurySEO & CONTENT STRATEGY TOOLImprove your content strategy with HubSpot's content & SEO planning tool.Learn MoreUpdated:05/08/23Content production before AI often required hours of research, drafting, editing, and optimization, with even experienced writers spending hours crafting a single blog post. With the rise of AI content writing tools, marketers now approach content creation more strategically. According to HubSpot's2026 State of Marketing report, marketers save an average of 3 hours per piece of content when using generative AI tools.The best AI writing tools now go beyond basic text generation. Modern platforms offerSEO optimization, brand voice consistency, plagiarism detection, and integration with content management systems.Content Hub, a CMS, includes AI-powered writing assistance through Breeze by HubSpot, helping marketing teams align SEO suggestions with AEO requirements.This guide tests 12 leading AI content writing tools across pricing, features, and real-world performance to help marketing teams find the right solution for their workflow.Table of ContentsWhat are AI Writing Tools?What Can AI Writing Tools Do?12 AI Content Writing Tools to Try:AI Writing Tools Pricing & Features ComparisonFrequently Asked Questions About AI Writing ToolsFinding the Perfect AI Writing PartnerWhat are AI Writing Tools?AI writing toolsare software platforms that use artificial intelligence to generate, edit, and optimize written content. These platforms leverage natural language processing (NLP), machine learning algorithms, and large language models (LLMs) to understand context, maintain tone consistency, and produce human-quality text across various formats.The difference between AI writing and traditional writing is stark. Manual content creation demands extensive research, multiple rounds of revision, and countless hours staring at a blank cursor. AI-powered authoring tools skip the paralysis entirely by generating content that follows proven structures and copywriting formulas that actually work.Free AI Content WriterIdeate, create, and share content. Easily create...Blog articles.Website copy.Social posts.And more!Get started freeAI Models vs. AI Writing ToolsAI ModelsAI Writing ToolsWhat they areCore AI engines that generate text responsesApplications built on AI models for content creationExamplesGPT-4, Claude, GeminiJasper, Copy.ai, WritesonicPrimary roleProduce human-like languageStreamline content workflowsEase of useRequires careful promptingDesigned for quick, guided useContent focusGeneral-purpose generationMarketing and content-specific tasksSEO supportNot included by defaultBuilt-in SEO analysis and optimizationTemplatesNonePre-built templates for blogs, ads, and emailsBrand voice controlManual and inconsistentStructured and repeatablePlagiarism checkingNot availableBuilt-in plagiarism detectionCollaborationSingle-user focusedTeam workflows and approvalsCMS integrationNot supportedDirect publishing and integrationsBest suited forExperimentation and flexibilityScalable content productionView all rowsView fewer rowsTypes of AI Writing SoftwareAI content writing toolsserve several purposes, such as generating email and ad copy, assisting with long-form blog posts, optimizing for SEO, and supporting creative marketing strategies. Since different AI authoring tools tackle specific content challenges, they’re unique and distinct from one another.Content GeneratorsThink of content generators as a personal writing team that never sleeps. Marketers can type in a topic and a rough outline, and watch them spin out blog posts, whitepapers, or ebooks faster than anyone can brew their morning coffee. These powerhouses excel at transforming skeletal outlines into coherent first drafts, handling the heavy lifting so marketers can focus on refinement rather than staring at blank pages.Writing AssistantsAI content writing tools don‘t generate content from scratch. Instead, they’re polish-and-perfect partners. AI authoring tools catch passive voice creeping into third paragraphs, suggest punchier alternatives to overused words, and flag sentences that make readers work too hard. It's like having a grammar expert and style coach working overtime to make writing crisp, clear, and compelling.SEO ToolsCreating brilliant content means nothing if no one finds it. That's where SEO tools come into play. These AI-powered authoring tools are like having an SEO expert analyzing content in real time to check keyword placement, evaluate heading structure, measure readability, and spot opportunities to strengthen internal links.The best part? Modern SEO AI authoring tools now optimize for AI-generated search results, helping content stay visible as search engines evolve. AI SEO tools turn the mystery of “what ranks” into actionable insights that marketers can actually use.Creative ToolsCreative Tools are the sprinters of the AI writing world, cranking out snappy ad headlines, scroll-stopping social posts, and click-worthy email subject lines at lightning speed. Built for marketers who need dozens of variations for testing, these tools speak fluent AIDA and PAS, turning conversion psychology into compelling micro-content.How AI Writing Tools Compare to ChatGPTChatGPT provides broad, conversational AI and generates content from prompts, but AI content writing tools are built specifically for professional content workflows. Some AI content writing tools include pre-built templates for multiple content formats, removing the need for detailed prompt engineering that ChatGPT requires.A handful of these AI authoring tools integrate directly with platforms like WordPress and HubSpot, streamlining the drafting, editing, and publishing process. Multi-user collaboration enables team editing, version control, and approvals, while offering real-time SEO scoring during writing to evaluate keywords, structure, and search intent instantly.What Can AI Writing Tools Do?AI authoring tools serve multiple purposes across the content creation lifecycle, from ideation through optimization. Understanding their capabilities helps marketing teams identify which features deliver the most value for their specific content needs and workflows.Generate Blog PostsAI-powered authoring tools reduce blog writing time by generating structured outlines, complete first drafts, and comprehensive articles that cover key subtopics. These platforms analyze topic keywords, research competitors‘ content, identify content gaps, and produce articles that answer readers’ questions.For content teams producing 10+ articles monthly, this capability transforms productivity. Instead of staring at a blank page, writers receive a solid foundation to build upon. The AI handles initial research, structures arguments logically, and maintains a consistent tone across thousands of words.According to the HubSpot 2026State of Marketing report, 80.5% of marketers are now using AI for content creation, with 42.4% using it extensively. This widespread adoption reflects the fact that AI authoring tools have become essential for modern content teams.The top AI tools for content writing allow users to specify parameters like target word count, desired tone (professional, casual, authoritative), and target audience expertise level. Advanced tools analyze top-ranking content for the target keyword and ensure the generated article covers the same depth of topics while adding unique perspectives.The result is faster content output. Writers then refine the output, add brand-specific examples, incorporate data from proprietary research, and polish the narrative voice.What to Look For:Template variety for different post types (listicles, how-to guides, comparison articles, thought leadership), outline generation quality before full draft creation, ability to specify word count and tone preferences, research capabilities that pull relevant statistics and examples, and integration with content management systems for seamless publishing.Create Ads and Social CopyShort-form content creation is where many AI content writing tools demonstrate their greatest strength. These platforms understand proven copywriting formulas and can craft conversion-focused messaging across multiple channels and formats.AI authoring tools trained on high-performing ad campaigns recognize patterns that drive clicks and conversions. They generate headlines that capture attention and calls to action that motivate reader response.Savvy marketers are already using AI to improve performance. The HubSpot 2026State of Marketingreport shows 67.4% of marketers use AI for campaign performance auditing and optimization, helping them refine ad copy based on real-time performance data.Social media content creation benefits particularly from AI assistance. Platforms can adapt the same core message across Twitter‘s character limits, LinkedIn’s professional tone, Instagram‘s visual-first approach, and Facebook’s engagement-focused format. This cross-platform adaptation saves hours of manual rewriting.Beyond that, AI can be used to make campaigns more personal. HubSpot found that68.5% leverage AI for personalized content experiences, enabling them to tailor messaging to individual prospects and customer segments at scale.The proficiency in short-form content makes AI authoring tools valuable for email marketing campaigns, Google Ads copy, Facebook and Instagram ad variations, Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, and product description pages that require persuasive, scannable copy.What to Look For:Platform-specific formatting that respects character limits and best practices for each channel, A/B testing capabilities that generate variations for performance comparison, conversion-focused templates based on proven frameworks, hook generators for attention-grabbing openings, and integration with advertising platforms for streamlined campaign creation.On-Page OptimizationSEO-focused AI content writing tools analyze content structure and provide real-time feedback to improve search visibility. These tools evaluate dozens of ranking factors simultaneously and offer actionable recommendations as users create content. According to HubSpot,70.6% of marketersuse AI for SEO across both traditional and AI-powered search engines.On-page optimization features examine heading hierarchy to ensure proper H2 and H3 structure, keyword placement and density to avoid over-optimization, content depth compared to top-ranking competitors, internal linking opportunities to other relevant pages, readability scores using established metrics like Flesch-Kincaid, and meta description quality to improve click-through rates.Advanced platforms now include answer engine optimization (AEO) features designed to help content appear in AI-generated responses from tools such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews.Additionally, recent research shows thatarticles over 2,900 words average 5.1 citations in AI responses, while those under 800 words get only3.2 citations, emphasizing the importance of comprehensive content depth for AI visibility.Real-time scoring provides immediate feedback during the writing process. Instead of drafting content and then optimizing it later, writers see how each paragraph affects overall SEO performance. This integrated approach produces stronger content in less time.For content teams managing SEO at scale across hundreds of articles, automated optimization saves hours of manual analysis while improving ranking potential. HubSpot's Content Hub with Breeze combines SEO and AEO optimization features within an integrated CMS platform, allowing teams to write, optimize, and publish without switching between multiple tools.What to Look For:Real-time SEO scoring visible during the writing process, keyword density analysis that prevents over-optimization, competitor content comparison showing gaps in topic coverage, readability metrics with specific improvement suggestions, AEO optimization features for AI search visibility, and content brief generation based on top-ranking pages.Generate TaglinesBrand messaging and tagline creation typically require multiple brainstorming sessions, creative revisions, and rounds of stakeholder feedback. AI authoring tools accelerate this process by generating dozens of options based on brand values, target audience characteristics, and desired emotional response.These platforms use established copywriting frameworks and pattern recognition from successful brand campaigns to create memorable, concise messaging. They understand the rhythm and structure that make taglines stick in memory, incorporating techniques like alliteration, rhyme, parallel structure, and punchy brevity.AI tools can generate taglines across different approaches: benefit-focused statements that highlight customer value, emotion-driven phrases that connect with audience feelings, differentiation-based messaging that sets brands apart, and aspiration-oriented taglines that inspire action.What to Look For:Brand voice customization that reflects company personality, industry-specific templates that understand sector nuances, emotional tone controls for different audience segments, variation generation that builds on successful concepts, and the ability to specify tagline length and structure preferences.Ready-Made TemplatesPre-built content templates eliminate the blank page problem by providing structured frameworks for common content types. Leading AI writing platforms offer hundreds of templates that codify proven content structures, ensuring consistency and reducing formatting time.Template libraries typically include blog post introductions that hook readers immediately, email newsletters with optimal structure for engagement, and product descriptions that highlight features and benefits.Some templates offer video scripts with proper pacing and call-to-action placement, FAQ sections that address common customer questions, and press release formats that follow journalistic standards.Whereas other templates, like case studies, showcase customer success, the purpose of landing page copy is typically conversion, social media post frameworks for different platforms, and ad copy templates for various campaign objectives.These templates aren't rigid forms but rather starting points that teams customize to match brand guidelines and content goals. Organizations can save successful content as custom templates, creating a library of proven formats for recurring content types.The consistency that templates provide is particularly valuable for distributed content teams. When multiple writers use the same template structure, the resulting content maintains a unified voice and format even across different authors.What to Look For:Template variety spanning content types and formats, customization options that allow brand-specific adjustments, ability to save and share custom templates across teams, regular updates with new template formats based on content trends, and preview functionality that shows template structure before generation.12 AI Content Writing Tools to Try:The AI content writing landscape in 2025 isn‘t one-size-fits-all, and that’s actually good news for marketers.Instead of a single “best” tool, marketers now have specialized solutions that excel at specific tasks. Whether crafting SEO articles, managing social media, or building an entire content strategy, there's an AI tool designed for every workflow.Best Overall AI Writing ToolsThis category highlights tools that provide balanced capabilities across content ideation, drafting, editing, and publishing. These tools are excellent for creators who need reliable performance across formats without learning complex workflows. They combine quality output with adaptability, making them suitable for bloggers, marketers, and business professionals looking for an all-purpose AI writing partner.HubSpot Breeze Content AssistantHubSpot Breeze Content Assistant is an AI authoring tool integrated within theHubSpot CRM and marketing platform. It generates content for blogs, emails, landing pages, and social media posts while leveraging CRM data for personalization and maintaining consistency across marketing campaigns.Key FeaturesCRM integration leverages customer data, interaction history, and segmentation for personalized content creation across marketing channelsMulti-format content generates blog posts, emails, landing pages, social media posts, and ad copy within the HubSpot platformBrand voice consistency maintains tone and messaging alignment across all content types and marketing campaignsSEO optimization integrates with HubSpot's SEO tools to ensure content follows best practices for search visibilityWhat I LikeExcellent integration with HubSpot's marketing platformCRM-powered personalization for targeted contentStreamlined workflow from creation to publicationConsistent brand voice across marketing channelsIn my experience, HubSpot Content Assistant with CRM data is its standout feature. It can reference customer information, campaign data, and previous interactions to create personalized content that aligns with specific marketing strategies.When I used the Content Assistant within HubSpot's CMS, the tool maintained brand voice consistency and automatically optimized content for SEO. The seamless workflow from writing to publishing eliminated the need to copy content between platforms.For email campaigns, Content Assistant leveraged contact properties and list segmentation to suggest personalized messaging that resonated with different audience segments, which significantly improved my engagement rates.Best for:HubSpot's Content Assistant is ideal for businesses already using HubSpot for CRM and marketing who want integrated AI writing capabilities without managing separate tools.Pro tip:Use HubSpot Content Assistant with smart content features to create dynamic emails and landing pages that automatically personalize based on contact properties and behavior. Combine it with theHubSpot Breeze AI content writerto create SEO- and AEO-optimized content.Rating: 4.5/5Pricing:Several HubSpot subscriptions include HubSpot Content Assistant:Available with Marketing Hub Professional at $800/monthAvailable with Marketing Hub Enterprise at $3,600/monthAvailable with Content Hub Professional at $450/monthAvailable with Content Hub Enterprise at $1,500/monthChatGPTChatGPT is an AI-powered conversational assistant and content-writing tool that excels at generating, editing, and refining written content across multiple formats. It uses advanced language models (primarily GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, and o1) to produce high-quality text for blog posts, marketing copy, social media content, emails, and scripts.Key FeaturesChatGPT understands context and maintains conversation history, allowing users to build on previous responses and refine content through natural dialogue.Supports multiple writing styles and tones from formal business communications to casual social media posts with the ability to switch styles mid-conversation.ChatGPT's memory feature (in Plus and Team plans) remembers user preferences, writing style requirements, and project details across sessions to generate more personalized content.What I LikeExceptionally user-friendly interface with a clean design and a minimal learning curve.Strong ability to maintain context and iterate on content without losing the thread.Versatile across content types from long-form articles to concise ad copy.In my opinion, ChatGPT is one of the best AI content writing tools because it provides versatile writing assistance, contextual understanding, and the ability to adapt tone and style to user requirements. I often use ChatGPT for its intuitive interface, quick content generation, and ability to iterate on drafts with follow-up instructions.When I entered my prompt, ChatGPT generated a well-structured draft with clear headings, natural flow, and appropriate tone. It also offered suggestions for improvement and allowed me to refine specific sections without rewriting the entire piece.I also downloaded the ChatGPT app on my iPhone 14 Pro. The app requires iOS 16.1 or later versions, and my phone supports it. The usage experience was smooth, and I could use voice input to dictate content ideas or receive spoken responses.Best for:ChatGPT is the best option for content marketers, copywriters, and business professionals who need versatile, high-quality written content across multiple formats and use cases.Pro tip:Use ChatGPT to create first drafts and iterate on content. Make sure to use the right prompts to adjust tone, length, and style.Rating: 4/5Pricing:ChatGPT offers a tiered pricing plan for individuals and enterprises:Free tier with GPT-4o mini and limited featuresChatGPT Plus at $20/monthChatGPT Pro at $200/monthChatGPT Team at $25/month per user (annual) or $30/month (monthly)ChatGPT Enterprise with custom pricingBest for SEO-Driven ContentThese tools specialize in producing search-optimized articles and briefs that align with ranking intent. They combine AI writing capabilities with deep keyword research, competitive analysis, real-time SEO scoring, and content recommendations to help content rank effectively in search engines like Google.WritesonicWritesonic is an AI content writing tool that combines content creation with SEO optimization and fact-checking capabilities. It offers solutions for SEO-optimized articles, blog posts, ads, landing pages, and product descriptions while ensuring factual accuracy through real-time verification.Key FeaturesReal-time fact-checking verifies claims against web sources and provides citations for credibilitySEO optimization tools analyze keywords, suggest improvements, and ensure content ranks well in search resultsChatsonic offers conversational AI with web access for research and content ideation based on current informationSupports 25+ languages with quality outputs for global content marketingWhat I LikeExcellent fact-checking and citation features for credible contentStrong SEO optimization capabilities with actionable recommendationsVersatile content types from social posts to long-form articlesCompetitive pricing with generous word limitsFrom my testing, Writesonic stands out for its fact-checking feature, which verifies claims in real time using web sources. That makes it particularly valuable for content that requires accuracy and credibility, such as thought leadership articles and research-based blog posts.When I generated a long-form article, Writesonic provided inline citations and fact-checking indicators along with SEO-optimized content. The platform highlighted claims that needed verification and suggested supporting sources, significantly reducing my editing time.I also tested Chatsonic, Writesonic's conversational AI feature. That allowed me to generate content based on current events and trending topics.Best for:Writesonic is best suited for content creators and marketers who prioritize factual accuracy and SEO performance.Pro tip:Use Writesonic's “Sonic Editor” to refine AI-generated content with commands like “make it more engaging” or “add statistics” for iterative improvements.Rating: 4.5/5Pricing:Writesonic offers flexible pricing tiers:Free trial with 10,000 wordsChatsonic at $15/month or $144/yearIndividual at $20/month or $192/yearStandard at $99/month or $948/yearProfessional (custom pricing for teams)GetGenieGetGenie is an AI-powered authoring tool designed specifically for SEO optimization among WordPress users. It combines AI content generation with comprehensive SEO features, including keyword research, competitor analysis, NLP keyword suggestions, and real-time content scoring, all within the WordPress editor.Key FeaturesOne-click blog generation creates complete outlines based on keyword analysis and competitor research, streamlining content planning.Real-time content scoring evaluates SEO performance as users write content, with specific recommendations for improvement across 15+ ranking factors.NLP keyword analysis identifies semantically related terms and questions from platforms like Quora and Reddit to ensure comprehensive topic coverage.Competitor SERP analysis shows exactly what top-ranking content includes, revealing gaps and opportunities to create superior articles.37+ AI writing templates cover everything from blog intros and conclusions to product descriptions, ad copy, and social media posts using proven frameworks like AIDA and PAS.WooCommerce integration generates optimized product descriptions that highlight features and benefits while incorporating relevant keywords.What I LikeThe WordPress integration eliminates the need to switch between tools as everything happens in one place.Content scoring updates in real-time, showing exactly how changes affect SEO performance.Competitor analysis reveals specific content gaps that other tools miss.NLP keyword suggestions go beyond basic keyword research to include semantic variations and related questions.The free plan offers 2,500 words per month, making it easy to test before committing.In my experience, what sets GetGenie apart is the seamless WordPress integration. I didn't need to jump between multiple tabs or copy-paste content between platforms. The tool lives directly inside the WordPress editor, letting me write, optimize, and publish without ever leaving the platform.The one-click blog generator impressed me as it analyzed top-ranking competitors, suggested relevant keywords, and generated a complete outline in under a minute.When I tested the SEO features, GetGenie displayed real-time content scores as I wrote. It analyzed my use of NLP keywords, checked the heading structure, evaluated readability, and compared the depth of my content with that of top-ranking competitors. The tool even pulled questions from Quora and Reddit that I hadn't considered, helping me create more comprehensive content that actually answers what people are searching for.GetGenie offers both a WordPress plugin and a standalone web application. I tested the WordPress plugin since that's where most users will benefit from the integration. The interface takes some time to get used to since there are a lot of features packed into the dashboard. But after watching a few tutorials, the workflow became intuitive.Best for:GetGenie is the best option for WordPress users and WooCommerce store owners who want to combine content creation and SEO optimization in a single platform without switching between multiple tools.Pro tip:Use GetGenie‘s competitor analysis feature before writing. This research reduces the time to create outlines from 30 minutes to 5 minutes.Rating:4/5Pricing:GetGenie offers a flexible pricing structure with a generous free plan. These tools are tailored for large teams and regulated industries where consistency, audits, permissions, and data governance are critical.WriterWriter is an enterprise-focused AI authoring tool that emphasizes brand consistency, compliance, and team collaboration. It offers advanced governance features, custom AI models, and integration capabilities designed for large organizations with complex content requirements.Key FeaturesUsers can train Custom AI models on proprietary company data to generate content that reflects specific industry knowledge and brand voiceGovernance and compliance tools enforce brand guidelines, flag non-compliant content, and maintain audit trails for regulatory requirementsTeam collaboration features include role-based permissions, approval workflows, and version control for complex content projectsEnterprise integrations connect with tools like Salesforce, Figma, Chrome, and Microsoft Office for seamless workflowsWhat I LikeExceptional governance and compliance capabilities for regulated industriesHighly customizable AI models trained on company-specific contentRobust security features, including SOC 2 Type II complianceComprehensive analytics for team performance and content qualityIn my opinion, Writer stands out for its enterprise-grade security and compliance features. The platform offers role-based access control, audit logs, and content governance tools, making it suitable for regulated industries such as finance, healthcare, and legal services.When I tested Writer with a team workflow, the platform‘s style guide enforcement was impressive. It automatically flagged content that didn’t align with brand guidelines, suggested approved terminology, and ensured consistency across documents created by different team members.The tool’s ability to create content trained on company-specific data sets sets it apart from consumer-focused tools. That allows organizations to generate content that reflects their unique voice, industry terminology, and compliance requirements.Best for:Writer is ideal for enterprise organizations that need robust governance, brand consistency, and compliance features across large content teams.Pro tip:Use Writer's terminology management feature to create comprehensive glossaries of approved terms, abbreviations, and phrases to ensure consistency across all company content.Rating: 4.5/5Pricing:Writer offers enterprise-focused pricing:Team at $18/month per userEnterprise (custom pricing based on requirements)Custom solutions for large organizations with specific needsJasperJasper is an AI authoring tool designed for marketing teams that generates high-quality content across multiple formats. It specializes in brand voice consistency and offers templates for blogs, social media, ads, and emails to create content that aligns with established brand guidelines.Key FeaturesJasper learns and maintains brand voice across all content types through customizable brand profiles and style guidesOffers 50+ templates covering blog posts, social media content, ad copy, email campaigns, and product descriptionsJasper Art generates custom images to complement written content, creating complete marketing assets in one platformSupports 25+ languages with quality translation and localization capabilitiesWhat I LikeExceptional brand voice consistency across different content formatsIntuitive interface with helpful templates for quick content creationStrong integration ecosystem with popular marketing toolsCollaborative features for team workflowsI think Jasper’s ability to learn and replicate specific brand voices makes it particularly valuable for enterprise marketing teams managing multiple campaigns simultaneously.When I used Jasper, the platform offered multiple templates organized by use case. The Boss Mode feature allowed me to generate long-form content with minimal input, and the output quality was consistently high across different content formats.I also tested Jasper's Chrome extension, which integrates seamlessly with platforms such as Google Docs, Gmail, and social media sites. The extension works on most browsers and requires minimal setup.Best for:Jasper is ideal for marketing teams and agencies that need to produce high-volume, on-brand content across multiple channels.Pro tip:Use Jasper's Brand Voice feature by uploading existing content samples to train the AI on specific tone and style preferences.Rating: 4/5Pricing:Jasper offers multiple plans based on team size and features:Creator at $39/month or $468/year (1 user)Pro at $59/month or $708/year (1 user)Business (custom pricing for teams)TextCortexTextCortex is an enterprise AI agent infrastructure with an AI content writing tool that focuses on productivity and content personalization. It adapts to individual writing styles and offers contextual suggestions across web platforms through browser extensions, making it a versatile tool for various enterprise-grade writing tasks.Key FeaturesPersonalization engine learns from writing patterns and adapts suggestions to match individual styles over timeBrowser extension works across 30+ platforms, including Google Docs, Gmail, LinkedIn, Notion, and social media sitesKnowledge Bases allow users to upload custom content for the AI to reference and learn fromMultiple language support with quality outputs in 25+ languages for global content needsWhat I Like:Excellent personalization that improves with usageWide platform compatibility through a browser extensionFlexible pricing with a generous free tierFast content generation with minimal latencyTextCortex's strength lies in its ability to learn from writing patterns and adapt its suggestions accordingly. The more someone uses it, the better it becomes at matching personal styles, which is particularly useful for maintaining a consistent voice across different projects.When I used TextCortex across different platforms, including Google Docs, Gmail, and LinkedIn, the browser extension provided contextually relevant suggestions. For email writing, it offered different tone options (professional, friendly, persuasive), while for blog writing, it focused on structure and SEO.The platform's “Zeno Chat” feature functions as a conversational AI that can research topics, summarize information, and generate content based on custom prompts, making it useful for both content creation and research.Best for:TextCortex is best for enterprise-grade teams who need a personalized AI assistant that works across multiple platforms and adapts to their unique writing style.Pro tip:Train TextCortex on best-performing content by using the “Knowledge Bases” feature to upload samples, ensuring AI-generated content matches proven styles.Rating: 4/5Pricing:TextCortex offers scalable pricing options:Free tier with 20 creations dailyLite at $5.59/month or $67.08/yearUnlimited at $23.99/month or $287.88/yearBusiness (custom pricing for teams)AI Writing Tools Pricing & Features ComparisonThis comparison chart highlights the key features and pricing of the top AI writing tools to help marketers make an informed decision:AI ModelsAI Writing ToolsWhat they areCore AI engines that generate text responsesApplications built on AI models for content creationExamplesGPT-4, Claude, GeminiJasper, Copy.ai, WritesonicPrimary roleProduce human-like languageStreamline content workflowsEase of useRequires careful promptingDesigned for quick, guided useContent focusGeneral-purpose generationMarketing and content-specific tasksSEO supportNot included by defaultBuilt-in SEO analysis and optimizationTemplatesNonePre-built templates for blogs, ads, and emailsBrand voice controlManual and inconsistentStructured and repeatablePlagiarism checkingNot availableBuilt-in plagiarism detectionCollaborationSingle-user focusedTeam workflows and approvalsCMS integrationNot supportedDirect publishing and integrationsBest suited forExperimentation and flexibilityScalable content productionView all rowsView fewer rowsFrequently Asked Questions About AI Writing ToolsWhat is the best AI tool for authors?The best AI writing tool for authors depends heavily on individual goals and writing workflows. For marketers and teams already using HubSpot, Content Hub with Breeze by HubSpot may be a strong fit, as it combines drafting, editing, optimization, and publishing into a single workflow.It’s also a strong option for authors who need more structure, tone control, or brand consistency, particularly for professional publishing, team collaboration, and maintaining a consistent voice across large content projects.What is AI authoring?AI authoring is the use of artificial intelligence to assist in the writing process. It can help generate ideas, draft content, edit grammar, improve clarity, optimize SEO, and speed up repetitive writing tasks.Rather than replacing writers, AI authoring acts as a collaborative tool. Human authors still guide creativity, narrative direction, and critical judgment, while AI enhances efficiency, consistency, and scalability across different content formats.Is publishing AI-generated content legal?Yes, publishing AI-generated content is legal in most countries, including for blogs, marketing materials, and commercial use. However, legal frameworks governing copyright ownership vary by jurisdiction and the level of human involvement.Generally, meaningful human contribution, such as editing, structuring, and adding original insight, is required for copyright protection. Editorial oversight ensures originality, compliance, and ethical use, making AI a support tool rather than the sole author.Is ChatGPT the best AI writer?ChatGPT is one of the most versatile AI writing tools available, capable of handling a wide range of tasks, including drafting, brainstorming, summarizing, and conversational writing. Its flexibility makes it ideal for general use and experimentation.However, specialized AI writing tools often outperform ChatGPT in areas like SEO optimization, brand voice consistency, analytics, and team workflows. For professional publishing and marketing content, dedicated platforms like HubSpot may provide more targeted features.How do I choose the right AI writing tool?Choosing the right AI writing tool starts with understanding content needs. Consider whether the primary focus is writing blogs, academic content, marketing copy, or social media posts, as different tools excel in different areas.Other key factors include budget, SEO capabilities, collaboration features, integrations, and ease of use. Testing free trials and evaluating output quality can help teams find a tool that fits both the workflow and long-term goals.Do AI tools replace human writers?No, AI writing tools do not replace human writers. Instead, they enhance productivity by automating routine tasks like drafting, editing, and keyword optimization, allowing writers to focus on higher-level creative and strategic work.Human creativity, emotional intelligence, cultural understanding, and ethical judgment remain irreplaceable. The best content results from AI tools and human writers working together as complementary partners.Finding the Perfect AI Writing PartnerQuality content remains the cornerstone of an effective marketing strategy. While talented writers and marketers have long driven business success, AI authoring tools now offer powerful support to amplify their work.These AI content writing tools don’t replace human creativity and expertise, but can enhance it. By streamlining research, drafting, and editing workflows, AI-powered authoring tools free up creators to focus on strategy, originality, and authentic connection with audiences.Whether looking to scale content output, overcome writer's block, or simply work more efficiently, the AI authoring tools explored in this guide offer compelling capabilities worth testing.Try one that aligns with specific needs and see how it transforms the approach to content creation.Free AI Content WriterIdeate, create, and share content.
